PreToolUse.description: Warn when editing OpenAPI spec — suggest /openapi-sync after

hooks.command: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const p=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(/openapi\.(yaml|yml|json)$|schemas\/.+\.(yaml|yml|json)$/.test(p)){process.stderr.write('\n[openapi-guardian] Editing OpenAPI spec — remember to run /openapi-sync after to update routes/types/SDK.\n')}"
